programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

programme.title: Doctor G
programme.desc: Uday Gupta, a medical student, the only male in the gynaecology department of a medical college, ends up in a series of hilarious situations due to his hesitance.

programme.title: Ghoomer
programme.desc: A batting prodigy believes her cricketing career is over after she loses her right hand in an accident. However, a failed cricketer takes a chance on her and trains her to be a bowler instead.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1
programme.desc: A matchmaker gets insulted by a rich and arrogant businessman. Later, he decides to take a revenge against the businessman by making his daughter fall in love with a porter.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four lazy friends want to make easy money and aim to marry a rich girl. Their plan backfires after they meet Ritu and get embroiled with a dangerous criminal.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal gets stuck in a yacht for a night after he saves an attractive young woman. However, his wife, Ekta, suspects him of having an affair and decides to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Veerappan
programme.desc: Veerappan, a teenager, trains under his uncle to learn to smuggle and becomes a dacoit. When the police attempts to arrest him for his activities, he plans to make an escape.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
programme.desc: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.
